name: Ustad Milenial
overview: After graduating from a famous Islamic school, Ahmad has a plan to continue his study in Cairo, Egypt to become a preacher. Everything seems on the track until his father passes away and mandates Ahmad to continue their family business.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - WeTV Original Ustad Milenial | Arbani Yasiz, Prilly Latuconsina | Tayang 12 April
